summary: Completed testing of Banners tab in Navigation & Structure page. Fixed critical bug with SelectItem empty value. All banner CRUD operations working. Backend tests for page banners and sync exclusion all passing.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with value='' caused runtime error - Radix UI Select doesn't allow empty string values
ui_bugs.selector: SelectItem for Target Category and Target Group
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Changed value='' to value='none' and added value conversion logic in onValueChange handler

critical_code_review_comments: The fix for SelectItem empty value is correct - Radix UI Select component requires non-empty values for SelectItem
seed_data_creation: Created test banner for 'Tiles' group during UI testing (was deleted during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Banners tab fully functional after fix. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_banners_and_sync_exclusion.py cover page banners CRUD, category sync exclusion, and filter value sync exclusion.

tests_performed.notes: Shows '1 Page Banners' badge, Default Banner card, Quick Add Banners section
Initially crashed due to SelectItem value='' bug. Fixed by using value='none'

tests_performed.test: Edit Default button opens dialog with existing data
tests_performed.notes: Shows pre-populated title, subtitle, image URL, overlay color

tests_performed.test: Banner dialog shows live preview when image URL entered
tests_performed.notes: Preview section appears below form showing banner with title, subtitle, and overlay
Toast notification 'Banner created' shown, banner card appears in list, Quick Add updates
Confirmation dialog, toast 'Banner deleted', count updates, Quick Add refreshes

tests_performed.test: Quick Add Banners for Groups shows available groups
tests_performed.notes: Shows Tiles, Underfloor Heating, Flooring, Materials, Tools, Accessories. Groups with banners are hidden
Shows 6 Groups, 36 Categories, Sync from Products button
Button visible and functional (tested via backend API)
Shows 7 Filters, 1 Filter Groups, Sync Values from Products button

bug_fixed.description: SelectItem in Banner Dialog had value='' which caused Radix UI runtime error
bug_fixed.fix: Changed SelectItem value='' to value='none' for 'None' option, and added logic to convert 'none' back to empty string in onValueChange handler
